utterances.speaker: Elizabeth
utterances.text: This is my father , Paul Stevens . Dad , this is Ross Geller .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It ... it is great to meet you Paul .

emotion_cause.span: 2_It ... it is great to meet you Paul .

utterances.speaker: Paul
utterances.text: I usually prefer Elizabeth boyfriends to address me as Mr . Stevens .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Of course , of course , Mr . Stevens .

emotion_cause.span: 7_Why can not you get a girlfriend your own age ?

utterances.speaker: Paul
utterances.text: Why can not you get a girlfriend your own age ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: That is funny . Umm ... It is not funny .

utterances.speaker: Paul
utterances.text: I don’t like you going out with my daughter Ross .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I can , I can see that .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Umm , but I think if you give me umm , one chance I can , I can change your mind .

emotion_cause.span: 9_I don’t like you going out with my daughter Ross .

utterances.speaker: Paul
utterances.text: Okay . I will give you one chance to change my mind . You got one minute .
